user_message: Working on Nod Publishers's escalation triage. Got the support ticket -- help me draft the follow-up.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Samantha Singh <samantha.singh@nodpublisher.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-22 15:27 EST
Subject: Follow-up: escalation triage Review

Our team encountered some challenges with escalation triage. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

---
From: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
To: Samantha Singh <samantha.singh@nodpublisher.com>
Date: 2024-01-07 13:36 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Nod Publishers escalation triage

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with escalation triage. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

signals.detail: Signal detected for Nod Publishers: the cost projections need to factor in reserved instance pricing for accuracy

handoffs.condition: contact and opportunity records need updating

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF38-F trap (Skips champion's prior commitments -- replacement engagement misses context); produces complete Stakeholder map delta, opportunity-at-risk assessment, re-engagement plan, contact update proposals,
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF38-F failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF38-F failure mode (Skips champion's prior commitments -- replacement engagement misses context)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct escalation triage decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF38-F -- Skips champion's prior commitments -- replacement engagement misses context
